title: parameter tracing support causes internal error

features.name: localparam with logic type assigned from function call
features.description: Code should include a localparam with explicit logic type being assigned a value from a function call

features.name: function call with localparam as argument
features.description: Code should include a function call where a localparam is passed as an argument

features.name: two localparams with bitvector logic types
features.description: Code should include two localparams with explicit logic bitvector types where one is used as argument to compute the other
features.snippet:
localparam logic [31:0] mask = 32'hff_ff_00_00;
localparam logic [4:0] a = get_size(mask);
